footer.tagline: Understand your legal problem before you spend thousands on a lawyer.

pricingPage.title: Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: From free consumer guidance to firm-wide AI — including the Solo bundle for independent lawyers.
pricingPage.soloDescription: The SOLO bundle is built for one lawyer: matter workspace, AI Copilot, and monthly AI credits — without paying for unused seats.
pricingPage.consumerDescription: Self-service legal guidance and optional lawyer review — no firm account required.
pricingPage.aiCreditsBody: Credits scale with AI model usage — like Cursor. Auto tasks (Copilot, drafts) are efficient and use fewer credits. Premium deep analysis (Similar Cases, Opponent Strategy, Strategy Memo) uses your selected Premium model and is billed by token usage.
pricingPage.deepAnalysisNote: Deep case analysis requires Professional plan or above.
pricingPage.enterprisePrompt: Need enterprise SSO, data residency, or SCIM?

hero.title: Legal intelligence.

howItWorks.title: From situation to clarity in under 2 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No forms. No jargon. Just describe what's happening.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Type your situation in plain language — one message is all it takes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: 2–3 targeted questions sharpen the analysis before we run it.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Real statutes and case law are retrieved and applied to your specific facts.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Risk level, cited law, outcome probability, and next steps — free.

example.title: What your AI preview looks like
example.subtitle: Real analysis. Cited law. Outcome probability. Plain language.
example.caseSubtitle: Based on Rent Restriction Act (Cap 296) and Law of Contract Act
example.outcomeDisclaimer: Illustrative estimate based on stated facts. Not a legal prediction.
example.point1: Your 5-year lease cap of 7% annual increase contradicts the landlord's 30% demand.
example.point2: Rent Restriction Act limits increases on controlled premises without tribunal approval.
example.point3: Written evidence (contract, bank records) significantly strengthens your position.

difference.title: One ChatGPT prompt, three hallucinated cases,
difference.subtitle: Other platforms force you to pick a side — citizen or lawyer, one tool, one use case. Umbrella connects everything.
beforeItems: Ask ChatGPT. Get confident, fabricated case citations.
Pay a lawyer $300 just to learn if you might have a case.
Juggle billing in one app, matters in another, transcripts in a third.
Your client portal is literally email.
No outcome probability. No risk level. Just a wall of text.
afterItems: Auto-detected jurisdiction — we know where you are and apply your actual laws.
Every citation is grounded in real, indexed statutes and case law. Verifiable in one click.
Free preview shows risk level and outcome probability — before you spend a cent.
Matter management, billing, AI Copilot, and meeting transcripts — one platform.
Built-in client portal. Not email. Not a PDF.

whyNot.title: Why not just use
whyNot.subtitle: Every other tool was built for one audience. Umbrella was built for legal context.

items.name: ChatGPT
items.problem: Confident answers with fabricated citations. No jurisdiction awareness. No outcome probability.
items.solution: Umbrella reads your facts, retrieves real statutes and case law, and cites sources you can open in one click.

items.name: LegalZoom
items.problem: Document templates with no context. No analysis of your specific situation. No firm tools.
items.solution: Umbrella analyzes your situation first, then drafts documents grounded in applicable law — plus a full firm OS.

items.name: Clio

items.solution: Umbrella is the only platform where citizens get AI legal analysis and firms get a matter-aware Copilot — connected.

trust.title: Built for Trust
trust.subtitle: Your case, your data, your privacy. Always.

items.title: Not Legal Advice
items.desc: Clear disclaimers on every output. Lawyer review available when needed.

items.title: Private to Your Account
items.desc: Cases are private. Other users never see your data.

items.title: Jurisdiction-Grounded
items.desc: Guidance grounded in your jurisdiction's actual laws and case law — not generic templates.

items.title: Cited Sources
items.desc: Every output references real statutes, case law, and official guidance.

items.question: Is this legal advice?
items.answer: No. Umbrella provides legal information and guidance to help you understand your situation. For formal legal advice, connect with a licensed lawyer through our platform.

items.question: How much does the free preview cost?
items.answer: The legal issue checker preview is free for registered users, with a limited number of AI credits included. Full reports and lawyer review are paid upgrades.

items.question: Which jurisdictions are fully supported?
items.answer: We have full legal database coverage with jurisdiction-specific laws and a local lawyer marketplace. We accept issues from all locations and provide best-effort guidance where full coverage isn't yet available.

items.question: Can lawyers use this platform too?
items.answer: Yes. Umbrella is built for both sides. Individuals get guided legal analysis and document support. Law firms get a full practice management workspace — matter tracking, billing, meeting transcripts, an AI Copilot, and a client intake pipeline — all in one place.

items.question: What happens to my data?
items.answer: Your data is private to your account. Other users and firms cannot access it. We never use your data to train AI models without explicit consent, and your data stays in your region.

items.question: How is Umbrella different from other legal tools?
items.answer: Most legal software was built for one audience — either large firm billing or generic document storage. Umbrella is built from the ground up to understand legal context: it reads your situation, maps it to applicable law, and helps you act. It works for individuals and firms, with everything connected in one platform.

forLawyersSubhead: The all-in-one legal practice management platform — native transcripts, matter-aware Copilot, trust accounting, and automation-first workflows.
forLawyersCardCaption: Native meeting capture → transcript → AI notes → auto timeline updates.
forLawyersFeatureDeadlinesDesc: Automated deadline tracking with intelligent alerts.
forLawyersFeatureMattersDesc: Intake workflows, conflict checks, and stage pipelines.
forLawyersFeatureTrustDesc: Built-in trust ledger with approval workflows.
forLawyersFeaturePortalDesc: Secure portal for documents, invoices, and messages.

forLawyersCtaSubtitle: Join forward-thinking law firms using Umbrella.
developersIntro: Integrate Umbrella with your firm systems using API keys and signed webhooks. Manage keys and subscriptions from Settings once signed in.
developersAuthDesc: Firm admins create keys via the authenticated API. Pass the key on every request.
developersSubscriptionsDesc: Register HTTPS endpoints to receive event payloads signed with HMAC-SHA256.
developersVerifyDeliveries: Verify deliveries using the X-Legal-Signature header. Test connectivity with POST /webhooks/test.
developersSecurityRotate: Rotate API keys periodically and scope them to the minimum permissions required.
developersSecurityWebhook: Webhook secrets must be stored securely; never commit them to source control.
developersSecurityTls: All API traffic requires TLS. Tenant isolation is enforced via X-Tenant-Id on firm-scoped routes.
subscriptionCancelBody: No charges were made. You can return to pricing to choose a plan anytime.
